title: SEO, Hosting & Optimization
content: We provide end-to-end infrastructure services to ensure your website ranks high and loads fast.
details:
**Performance Optimization**: We strictly aim for a 99+ Google Lighthouse score. We optimize images, minify assets, and use edge caching to ensure sub-second load times worldwide.

**SEO**: Clean semantics, dynamic meta tags, and structured data ensure your site dominates search engine rankings.
